same.description: Same-element resonance (Section 8: Seven Luminaries & Five Elements, T21 p.399a). Energies reinforce each other -- a favorable time to lean into your innate strengths.

generating.description: Generative relationship (Section 8: Seven Luminaries & Five Elements, T21 p.399a). Energy flows smoothly, making it a good time to steadily advance ongoing plans.

neutral.description: Neutral energy (Section 8: Seven Luminaries & Five Elements, T21 p.399a). Suitable for handling routine tasks and maintaining your current pace.

weakening.description: Draining relationship (Section 8: Seven Luminaries & Five Elements, T21 p.399a). Energy depletes faster than usual -- manage your workload and take breaks.

conflicting.description: Clashing relationship (Section 8: Seven Luminaries & Five Elements, T21 p.399a). Energy is blocked. Postpone major decisions and focus on observation.

career.name: Career
career.description: Work performance, academic progress, and professional skill development (derived from Section 2 daily auspicious/inauspicious guidelines)

love.name: Love & Relationships
love.description: Romantic relationships, interpersonal connections, and family harmony (derived from Section 2 daily auspicious/inauspicious guidelines)

health.name: Health
health.description: Physical condition, mental well-being, and daily routines (derived from Section 2 daily auspicious/inauspicious guidelines)

wealth.name: Wealth
wealth.description: Income, investments, and asset accumulation (derived from Section 2 daily auspicious/inauspicious guidelines)

excellent: Eishin day:「宜入官拜職、對見大人」(T21 p.397c). Today favors bold moves -- interviews, proposals, meeting superiors, expanding your network. Action gets rewarded.
Shin day:「宜結交、歡宴聚會並吉」(T21 p.397c). Social interactions flow easily today. Gatherings, collaborations, and building connections are all well-timed.
Eishin day:「上書表進獻君王、興營買賣」(T21 p.397c). Reports, proposals, and business pushes are likely to land well today. If you have something to pitch, do it now.
Eishin-Shin days are broadly auspicious. Section 2 lists multiple matters as「並吉」-- whether you are pursuing a promotion or expanding your social circle, your drive and judgment are at a peak.
Yuu day:「宜結交朋友大吉」(T21 p.391b). Attend a gathering or reach out to someone you have not contacted in a while. You are likely to find people willing to help.
good: Jou day:「宜修道學問、作諸成就法並吉」(T21 p.398a). Today suits work that requires deep focus -- effort is more likely to yield results.
Yuu day:「宜結交朋友大吉」(T21 p.391b). Communication with colleagues and friends comes easier than usual, and teamwork is efficient.
An day:「造作園宅並吉」(T21 p.397c). A good day for building systems, tidying your environment, and steadily advancing projects.
Jou day:「合和長年藥法」(T21 p.398a). Today suits decisions that require careful weighing -- your judgment is steady.
Ki day:「宜結交、歡宴聚會並吉」(T21 p.397c). Social occasions tend to pay off. Meals and networking events are favorable.
neutral: An day:「造作園宅並吉」; Ki day:「不宜遠行買賣」(T21 p.397c-398a). A neutral zone -- handle routine tasks at your own pace.
Section 2 notes An day:「移徙吉」and Ki day:「歡宴聚會並吉」(T21 p.397c-398a), with mixed indications. Today suits organizing files and updating your to-do list -- no need to push for breakthroughs.
An-Ki level. Section 2:「安坐臥床帳吉」(T21 p.397c). No dramatic swings today. Rest, recharge, take a walk, and let your mind breathe.
An-Ki days carry mixed signals (T21 p.397c-398a). No need to force progress -- focus on maintaining what you already have and making sure things stay on track.
Section 2 An day:「造作園宅」(T21 p.397c); Ki day has mixed indications. Take it slow today. If something is not resolving, set it aside for now.
caution: Sui day:「唯宜解除諸惡、療病」「不宜出入遷移、買賣」(T21 p.398a). Think twice before deciding. Do not rush anything involving money.
Kai day:「餘並不堪」(T21 p.398a). Not the time to push for things. Keep a low profile, listen more than you speak, and focus on what you can control.
Ki day:「不宜遠行出入移徙、買賣」(T21 p.398a). Watch your words in social interactions. If disagreements arise, hold your opinion for now.
Sui day:「不宜買賣」. Do not make important financial calls based on gut feeling. Seek objective data or professional advice.
Kai day: aside from「宜作鎮壓、降伏怨讎」, everything else is「並不堪」. Double-check your workflow before acting to avoid small mistakes.
challenging: Gou day:「所作善惡亦不成就，甚衰」(T21 p.397c). Postpone major decisions. Treat today as a buffer day and focus on finishing what is already confirmed.
Tai day:「不宜舉動百事」(T21 p.397c). Your body may feel tired -- do not push through. Rest when you need to.
Mei day:「不宜舉動百事」(T21 p.397c). Section 3 advises「宜修功德」. Use this low period to review whether your direction is right and prepare for the next wave of action.
Gou-Tai days are not suited for launching new plans or taking risks. Spend your time organizing, repairing, and maintaining -- it saves energy for later.
Gou day being「甚衰」does not mean things stay this way. Fortune ebbs and flows as part of the Sanki cycle's natural rhythm. Wait patiently for the next Eishin-Shin day.

日.note: The Sun is the supreme yang body. It bolsters fire energy and also provides warmth to nurture wood energy.

月.note: The Moon is the supreme yin body. It bolsters water energy and also provides moisture to nourish wood energy.
